scripts.update-skill: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const url='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muxy-app/muxy/main/Muxy/Resources/skills/muxy-extension/SKILL.md';fetch(url).then(r=>{if(!r.ok)throw new Error('HTTP '+r.status);return r.text()}).then(t=>{for(const d of ['.claude/skills/muxy-extension','.agents/skills/muxy-extension']){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p.join(d,'SKILL.md'),t);console.log('Updated '+p.join(d,'SKILL.md'))}}).catch(e=>{console.error('Failed to update skill:',e.message);process.exit(1)})"

muxy.description: AI usage status bar and popover with live collectors for Claude Code, Codex, Amp, Copilot, Factory, Kimi, MiniMax, and Z.ai.
